summary: Tested Dynamic Kanban Boards feature (Dinamik Kanban Panoları). All 27 backend API tests passed. All 19 frontend UI tests passed. Feature fully functional: group-by dropdown with 6 options (status, assigned_to, potential_level, city, market, application), saved views CRUD, drag-drop status updates, customer detail card from Kanban.

design_issues.screen: Create View Modal & Customer Detail Card
issues: Console warning: Missing `Description` or `aria-describedby={undefined}` for {DialogContent} - accessibility improvement needed (minor, same as iteration_11)

passed_tests: ✅ Backend: GET /api/kanban/group-fields returns list of 6 grouping fields
✅ Backend: GET /api/kanban/views returns list of saved views
✅ Backend: POST /api/kanban/views creates new view
✅ Backend: PUT /api/kanban/views/{id} updates view
✅ Backend: DELETE /api/kanban/views/{id} deletes view
✅ Backend: GET /api/kanban/customers?group_by=status returns grouped customers
✅ Backend: GET /api/kanban/customers?group_by=assigned_to returns grouped customers
✅ Backend: GET /api/kanban/customers?group_by=potential_level returns grouped customers
✅ Backend: GET /api/kanban/customers?group_by=city returns grouped customers
✅ Backend: GET /api/kanban/customers?group_by=market returns grouped customers
✅ Backend: GET /api/kanban/customers?group_by=application returns grouped customers
✅ Backend: GET /api/kanban/columns returns column configuration
✅ Backend: PATCH /api/kanban/customers/{id}/field updates customer field
✅ Backend: PATCH /api/kanban/customers/{id}/status updates customer status
✅ Frontend: Kanban page loads with data-testid='kanban-page'
✅ Frontend: Group-by dropdown shows 6 options
✅ Frontend: Create View button opens modal
✅ Frontend: Create View modal has name input, group select, description input
✅ Frontend: New view created and appears in saved views tabs
✅ Frontend: Saved views displayed as horizontal tabs with 'Kayıtlı Görünümler:' label
✅ Frontend: Clicking saved view tab loads that view
✅ Frontend: View deletion works with confirmation
✅ Frontend: Kanban columns render correctly (6 status columns)
✅ Frontend: Kanban cards render with customer info (31 cards)
✅ Frontend: Clicking card opens customer detail dialog
✅ Frontend: Group-by potential_level shows Yüksek/Orta/Düşük columns
✅ Frontend: Group-by assigned_to shows user columns (Ahmet, Hakan ÖNEL, etc.)
✅ Frontend: Group-by city shows city columns (Ankara, İstanbul, Atanmamış)
✅ Frontend: Group-by market shows market columns (Baskı, F&B, etc.)
✅ Frontend: Group-by application shows application columns
critical_code_review_comments: Minor: Add aria-describedby to DialogContent for accessibility compliance (recurring issue from iteration_10, iteration_11)
seed_data_creation: Created test view 'TEST_Playwright_View' during testing (cleaned up)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Dynamic Kanban Boards feature fully functional. Backend endpoints: /api/kanban/group-fields, /api/kanban/views (CRUD), /api/kanban/customers?group_by=X, /api/kanban/columns, /api/kanban/customers/{id}/field, /api/kanban/customers/{id}/status. Frontend: Kanban.jsx with group-by dropdown, saved views tabs, create view modal, drag-drop support. All data-testid attributes in place for testing.
